category_sources: source_facts.description says it communicates with ModBus slave RTU or TCP; official README describes mbpoll as a ModBus RTU/TCP command-line utility.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "mbpoll"; source_facts.name is mbpoll.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and repository includes an official doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/epsilonrt/mbpoll; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify ModBus RTU/TCP slave communication and command-line usage.
